abort.already_configured: Only a single UPS can be configured.
abort.i2c_unavailable: I2C is unavailable. Enable I2C and confirm Home Assistant can access the Raspberry Pi I2C bus.
abort.ups_not_detected: I2C is available, but no compatible UPS board was detected at addresses 0x40 through 0x4f.

error.invalid_battery_levels: Shutdown battery level must be lower than warning battery level.
error.invalid_hat_address: Enter an INA219 I2C address from 0x40 through 0x4f.
error.invalid_relay_gpio: GPIO2 and GPIO3 are reserved for I2C. Select a different BCM GPIO number.
error.invalid_self_test: Self-test settling time must be shorter than its duration, and the failure level must be below the minimum starting level.

user.title: UPS Configuration
user.description: Configure the UPS hardware, runtime, shutdown, battery health, calibration, and self-test settings.

data_description.battery_capacity: Single battery capacity in mAh. For example, enter 3200 for three 3200 mAh batteries connected in series.
data_description.battery_current_threshold: Readings below this value are Battery; readings at or above it are Utility.
data_description.full_charge_voltage: Voltage treated as 100% for the 3S board. The upper battery-percentage curve scales smoothly to this value.
data_description.runtime_load_current: Minimum expected battery current in mA during an outage. A larger measured discharge current is used automatically.
data_description.runtime_calibration: Internal runtime adjustment. A completed calibration updates this value automatically.
data_description.update_interval: How often Home Assistant reads the UPS.

shutdown.name: Shutdown
shutdown.description: Warning and shutdown points used by Output and Initiate Shutdown.

data_description.warning_battery_level: Output becomes Warning on battery at or below this level.
data_description.critical_battery_level: Output becomes Critical and Initiate Shutdown turns on at or below this level. The board-specific low-voltage limit is also enforced.

data_description.battery_replacement_date: Optional installation date. Battery Replaced records today and resets all battery history.
data_description.battery_replacement_days: Battery Maintenance turns on when battery age reaches this many days.
data_description.cycle_limit: Battery Maintenance turns on after this many accumulated equivalent full discharge cycles.
data_description.deep_discharge_level: A discharge reaching this percentage counts as one deep discharge.
data_description.deep_discharge_count_limit: Battery Maintenance turns on after this many deep discharges.
data_description.high_voltage_threshold: Output becomes High Voltage after the battery remains strictly above this voltage for 15 seconds. Charging time above the threshold is also accumulated. The minimum is 12.50 V.
data_description.high_voltage_hours_limit: Battery Maintenance turns on after this many accumulated high-voltage hours.
data_description.runtime_degradation_level: Battery Maintenance turns on when a later calibration falls to this percentage of the first learned runtime.

automatic_testing.name: Calibration and Self-Test
automatic_testing.description: Automatic testing requires a normally closed utility relay controlled by a Raspberry Pi GPIO.

data_description.automatic_testing: Off keeps runtime calibration manual and disables self-test entities. On lets calibration and self-test control the GPIO relay.
data_description.self_test_duration: How long the UPS must run normally on battery for a self-test to pass.
data_description.self_test_minimum_level: A self-test cannot begin below this battery level.
data_description.self_test_settling_time: Ignore percentage and voltage failure checks briefly after utility is disconnected.
data_description.self_test_failure_level: After settling, an immediate drop to or below this level fails the test and turns on Battery Fault.
data_description.self_test_emergency_voltage: After settling, voltage at or below this value fails the test and restores utility.
data_description.relay_gpio: BCM GPIO number, not the physical header pin. GPIO17 is header pin 11; GPIO2 and GPIO3 are reserved for I2C.
data_description.relay_active_low: Leave off when a HIGH GPIO signal activates the relay. Turn on only for a relay activated by LOW.
data_description.relay_source_timeout: Restore utility if Output Source does not change to Battery within this many seconds.
data_description.relay_test_timeout: Restore utility if a runtime calibration does not reach the shutdown level within this many hours.

error.invalid_battery_levels: Shutdown battery level must be lower than warning battery level.
error.invalid_hat_address: Enter an INA219 I2C address from 0x40 through 0x4f.
error.invalid_relay_gpio: GPIO2 and GPIO3 are reserved for I2C. Select a different BCM GPIO number.
error.invalid_self_test: Self-test settling time must be shorter than its duration, and the failure level must be below the minimum starting level.

init.title: UPS Configuration
init.description: Choose whether to edit the UPS settings or restore installation defaults.

configure.title: UPS Configuration
configure.description: Configure the UPS hardware, runtime, shutdown, battery health, calibration, and self-test settings.

data_description.battery_capacity: Single battery capacity in mAh. For example, enter 3200 for three 3200 mAh batteries connected in series.
data_description.battery_current_threshold: Readings below this value are Battery; readings at or above it are Utility.
data_description.full_charge_voltage: Voltage treated as 100% for the 3S board. The upper battery-percentage curve scales smoothly to this value.
data_description.runtime_load_current: Minimum expected battery current in mA during an outage. A larger measured discharge current is used automatically.
data_description.runtime_calibration: Internal runtime adjustment. A completed calibration updates this value automatically.
data_description.update_interval: How often Home Assistant reads the UPS.

shutdown.name: Shutdown
shutdown.description: Warning and shutdown points used by Output and Initiate Shutdown.

data_description.warning_battery_level: Output becomes Warning on battery at or below this level.
data_description.critical_battery_level: Output becomes Critical and Initiate Shutdown turns on at or below this level. The board-specific low-voltage limit is also enforced.

data_description.battery_replacement_date: Clear this field to remove the date. Battery Replaced records today and resets all battery history.
data_description.battery_replacement_days: Battery Maintenance turns on when battery age reaches this many days.
data_description.cycle_limit: Battery Maintenance turns on after this many accumulated equivalent full discharge cycles.
data_description.deep_discharge_level: A discharge reaching this percentage counts as one deep discharge.
data_description.deep_discharge_count_limit: Battery Maintenance turns on after this many deep discharges.
data_description.high_voltage_threshold: Output becomes High Voltage after the battery remains strictly above this voltage for 15 seconds. Charging time above the threshold is also accumulated. The minimum is 12.50 V.
data_description.high_voltage_hours_limit: Battery Maintenance turns on after this many accumulated high-voltage hours.
data_description.runtime_degradation_level: Battery Maintenance turns on when a later calibration falls to this percentage of the first learned runtime.

automatic_testing.name: Calibration and Self-Test
automatic_testing.description: Automatic testing requires a normally closed utility relay controlled by a Raspberry Pi GPIO.

data_description.automatic_testing: Off keeps runtime calibration manual and disables self-test entities. On lets calibration and self-test control the GPIO relay.
data_description.self_test_duration: How long the UPS must run normally on battery for a self-test to pass.
data_description.self_test_minimum_level: A self-test cannot begin below this battery level.
data_description.self_test_settling_time: Ignore percentage and voltage failure checks briefly after utility is disconnected.
data_description.self_test_failure_level: After settling, an immediate drop to or below this level fails the test and turns on Battery Fault.
data_description.self_test_emergency_voltage: After settling, voltage at or below this value fails the test and restores utility.
data_description.relay_gpio: BCM GPIO number, not the physical header pin. GPIO17 is header pin 11; GPIO2 and GPIO3 are reserved for I2C.
data_description.relay_active_low: Leave off when a HIGH GPIO signal activates the relay. Turn on only for a relay activated by LOW.
data_description.relay_source_timeout: Restore utility if Output Source does not change to Battery within this many seconds.
data_description.relay_test_timeout: Restore utility if a runtime calibration does not reach the shutdown level within this many hours.

reset_configuration.title: Reset Configuration to Defaults
reset_configuration.description: This restores all configurable settings to their installation defaults. The board address, battery replacement date, learned runtime calibration, and persistent battery history are preserved.
